recommendations.title: The Town that Dreaded Sundown
recommendations.overview: A masked maniac terrorizes the same small community where a murderer known as the Phantom Killer struck decades earlier.

recommendations.title: Burnt Offerings
recommendations.overview: A family moves into a large old mansion in the countryside which seems to have a mysterious and sinister power over its new residents.

recommendations.title: Home Invasion
recommendations.overview: Terror arrives at the one place we all feel safest... When a wealthy woman, Chloe, and her stepson, Jacob, are targeted by a trio of expert thieves in their remote mansion, her only form of help comes from a call with Mike, a security systems special

recommendations.title: Blood and Black Lace
recommendations.overview: Isabella, a young model, is murdered by a mysterious masked figure at a fashion house in Rome. When her diary, which details the house employees' many vices, disappears, the masked killer begins killing off all the models in and around the house to f

recommendations.title: Dementia 13
recommendations.overview: A scheming widow hatches a bold plan to acquire her late husband's inheritance, unaware that she is being targeted by an ax murderer who lurks in the family's estate.

recommendations.title: Madhouse
recommendations.overview: A horror movie star returns to his famous role after spending years in a mental institution, but the character seems to be committing murders independent of his will.

recommendations.title: The Old Dark House
recommendations.overview: In a remote region of Wales, five travelers beset by a relentless storm find shelter in an old mansion.

recommendations.title: Dangerous Game: The Legacy Murders
recommendations.overview: A family reunion at a remote mansion takes a lethal turn when they are trapped inside and forced to play a deadly survival game where only one will make it out alive.

recommendations.title: Angst
recommendations.overview: A killer is released from prison and breaks into a remote home to kill a woman, her handicapped son and her pretty daughter.

recommendations.title: The Devil Below
recommendations.overview: A group of four amateur adventurers who specialize in exploring remote and forsaken places pay a visit to Shookum Hills, a town in the remote Appalachian Mountains which was abandoned decades ago due to a mysterious coal mine fire.
